summary: Light Mode Theme Cleanup Verification - PASS. Tested Contact Detail, Leaderboard, Thread, and Inbox pages in light mode. All text elements are visible with proper contrast. Code review confirms dynamic theme-aware colors are used throughout (colors.text, colors.textSecondary, colors.textTertiary). No JavaScript runtime errors. Dark mode regression test also passed.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Light mode theme cleanup COMPLETE and VERIFIED. All 15+ files with theme fixes are working correctly. Key pages tested: Contact Detail, Leaderboard, Thread, Inbox. To test light mode: localStorage.setItem('theme_mode', 'light') then reload. Dark mode is default. Twilio SMS is MOCKED.
